# eeglab_min

Minimal subset of [EEGLAB](https://sccn.ucsd.edu/eeglab/) functions required for EEG topographic plots (`topoplot`).

## Included files

- `topoplot.m` — Scalp topography plotting
- `icadefs.m` — EEGLAB default configuration
- `readlocs.m` — Electrode location reader
- `loadtxt.m` — Text file loader (used by readlocs)
